SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Daniloff, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:15am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Matthew Stotts, appears in Pro Per;
Respondents, Alexandre and Melissa Glorieux, appear in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn testify in the narrative.
10:04am
Matter is submitted. Some evidence is retained.
